problem: Two different naming systems with minimal overlap

approach_options.name: Create Name Translator
approach_options.description: Build mapping between rule_list IDs and compliance function names
approach_options.time: 8-12 hours manual, or build smart mapper
approach_options.benefit: Enables use of existing 8K+ functions for compliance

approach_options.name: Develop Missing Functions
approach_options.description: Build 3,889 new functions matching compliance names
approach_options.benefit: Direct mapping, no translation layer needed

approach_options.name: Hybrid Approach (RECOMMENDED)
approach_options.description: Map what exists + develop critical gaps
approach_options.benefit: Leverage existing 8K functions + fill compliance gaps

recommended_next_steps: 1. Build service-level mapping (guardduty functions in both systems)
2. Create automated name translator (rule_list ID → compliance function name)
3. Identify TRUE gaps (compliance needs that rule_list cannot satisfy)
4. Prioritize development of critical missing functions
5. Create alias/mapping file for existing functions
